title: Card-tester lockout now configurable
body_md: You can now set the failed-payment threshold and lockout window from **Company → Defaults & Policies**. Previously these were hardcoded to 10 attempts / 24 hours. Existing tenants retain those defaults; adjust in Company settings.

title: Reusable Formula library
body_md: Buyer's premiums, taxes, commissions, and sliding scales can now be defined once under **Formulas** and referenced from any auction. Previously each auction required rates to be re-entered. Bulk rate changes now take effect across all auctions that reference the formula.

title: Reusable Locations
body_md: Auction sites, pickup addresses, and warehouses can now be saved under **Locations** and referenced by ID on each auction record. No more copy-pasting addresses between auctions.

title: Role-based team access
body_md: Added five built-in roles: Owner, Admin, Clerk, Cataloger, Accountant — each with a pre-defined permission set. A Custom role lets you compose any combination. Per-auction access restriction is available for all non-Owner roles.

title: Miscellaneous section launched
body_md: The Miscellaneous section is now live. It covers the full auctioneer configuration surface: Accounts, Formulas, Users, Company, Locations, and Announcements. This replaces the previous Settings page.
